cases.prompt: Run a health check on the codebase and give me a quality score.

assertions.text: Wraps existing project tools: type checker, linter, test runner, dead code detector, and shell linter
Computes a weighted composite 0-10 code quality score
Tracks the quality score trend over time

cases.prompt: 코드베이스 얼마나 건강한지 검사해줘. 전체 체크 돌려봐.

assertions.text: Produces a code quality dashboard from all the wrapped checks
Returns a single weighted 0-10 score summarizing health
